speaker: 用户
original_text: 你们为什么冻结我的账户
translated_to_english: Why did you freeze my account?

speaker: 客服
original_text: 您好，账户被冻结因为KYC复核未通过
translated_to_english: Hello, the account is frozen because the KYC review was not passed.

speaker: 用户
original_text: 我已经提交了护照和地址证明
translated_to_english: I have already submitted my passport and proof of address.

speaker: 客服
original_text: 我们需要您再提交一份银行对账单
translated_to_english: We need you to submit another bank statement.

speaker: 用户
translated_to_english: I have already sent it three times.
unmet_information_need: resolution or confirmation of previous submissions

speaker: 客服
original_text: 很抱歉，我没有看到记录
translated_to_english: I'm sorry, I didn't see any records.
